description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The documents herein define the general

Liquidity Layer operational procedures for interacting with ERC-7540-compliant tokenized vaults. ERC-7540 is a standard interface for vaults representing and managing multiple underlying assets within a single vault.

Liquidity Layer can integrate with various ERC-7540 vaults. For instance-specific parameters (such as vault addresses, asset addresses, and rate limits), refer to the relevant ERC-7540 Instance Configuration Document.
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes
